hooks.command:
rm -f /tmp/llm-kb-wiki-edits; STATE=$(cat /tmp/llm-kb-session-state.md 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$STATE" ] && printf '
--- Session State (Recovery) ---
%s
--- End Session State ---
IMPORTANT: Re-read active compile file. Do NOT redo completed steps.
' "$STATE" || true

INPUT=$(cat); PROMPT=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('prompt',''))" 2>/dev/null); FILE=$(echo "$PROMPT" | grep -oE 'compile raw/[^ ]+' | sed 's/compile //' | head -1); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; SLUG=$(basename "$FILE" .md | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | tr '_' '-'); INFO=$(cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && ./tools/scan.sh --info "$FILE" 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'lines|strategy|words' | head -3 | sed 's/^/  /'); printf '
## Compile Context (auto-injected)
- Source: %s
- Summary target: wiki/summaries/%s.md
- Concepts dir: wiki/concepts/
%s
' "$FILE" "$SLUG" "$INFO"

INPUT=$(cat); echo "$INPUT" | grep -q 'wiki/' && RULES=$(cat "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.local-rules.md" 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$RULES" ] && printf '
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ .local-rules.md (APPLY BEFORE WRITING) в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
%s
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
' "$RULES" || true
INPUT=$(cat); echo "$INPUT" | grep -q 'wiki/' && cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && python3 tools/build-index.py > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'вњ… Index rebuilt' || true

INPUT=$(cat); echo "$INPUT" | grep -q 'wiki/' || exit 0; COUNTER=/tmp/llm-kb-wiki-edits; COUNT=$(cat "$COUNTER" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); COUNT=$((COUNT+1)); echo "$COUNT" > "$COUNTER"; [ "$COUNT" -eq 5 ] && echo 'вљ пёЏ  5 wiki edits this session вЂ” consider running lint before ending' || true
cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && result=$(./tools/file-back.sh --list 2>/dev/null) && echo "$result" | grep -q 'pending file-back' && echo "$result" || true

STATE_FILE=/tmp/llm-kb-session-state.md; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"; ACTIVE=$(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('.compile-progress.json')); print(d.get('file','none'))" 2>/dev/null || echo 'none'); PENDING=$(./tools/file-back.sh --list 2>/dev/null | grep -c 'pending' || echo 0); printf '## Wiki Session
- Saved: %s
- Active compile: %s
- Pending file-backs: %s
' "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" "$ACTIVE" "$PENDING" > "$STATE_FILE"
